backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko canister actor with no methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing a change to remove the 7th image from GallerySection.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of all frontend source files for reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and theme variables defining red‑themed OKLCH color tokens for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting SEO metadata, Open Graph tags, fonts, and mounting the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component composing all site sections with header and footer.
frontend/src/components/Section.tsx: Reusable layout component providing section padding, titles, subtitles, and wrappers.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer showing company details, contact info, legal info, and a dynamic attribution bar.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky responsive header with logo, scroll navigation, and mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook creating an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshing queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and provider for Internet Identity authentication, handling identity loading, login, and status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating no backend queries are needed.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and a red‑white themed light/dark color system with utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/publicAsset.ts: Helper that normalizes asset paths for consistent public URL resolution.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app with React Query and InternetIdentityProvider before rendering App.
frontend/src/sections/AboutSection.tsx: Renders the About section with business details, highlights, and descriptive cards.
frontend/src/sections/ContactSection.tsx: Displays contact information, legal details, and a call‑to‑action with email links.
frontend/src/sections/GallerySection.tsx: Implements an image gallery with fallback handling and a lightbox for viewing facility photos.
frontend/src/sections/HeroSection.tsx: Hero banner with branding, tagline, and buttons that smooth‑scroll to other sections.
frontend/src/sections/ServicesSection.ts: Renders a services section with cards displaying service icons, descriptions, feature lists, and a call‑to‑action link scrolling to the contact section.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, typography, animations, container settings, and plugins for the project's theme.
project_state.json: Stores the project’s state, objectives, requirements, and known issues for building the Shri Guha International marketing website.
